value.description:
Bindable value. Reading the value yields a hex string (`#rrggbb`, or
`#rrggbbaa` when `alpha` is true). Setting the value accepts hex, `rgb()`,
`rgba()`, `hsl()`, or `hsla()` input; invalid input is normalized to `''`.

defaultValue.description: Initial color when `value` is not bound. Same input formats as `value`.

alpha.description: Enable the alpha slider and emit `#rrggbbaa`. Default `false`.

name.description: Form field name. When set, a hidden input mirrors the current value for form submission.

swatches.description: Optional palette of preset colors rendered below the picker.

class.description: Additional classes merged onto the root element.

label.description: Accessible label for the picker. Default `'Color picker'`.

unsupportedProps.name: onchange
unsupportedProps.description: Fired on commit (pointer up, swatch click, slider key).

unsupportedProps.name: oninput
unsupportedProps.description: Fired on every intermediate update (drag, slider key, swatch click).
